items.name: Bratwurst
items.description: Classic Bavarian-style pork bratwurst, served on a fresh roll with sauerkraut.

items.name: Smoked Kielbasa
items.description: Traditional Polish smoked sausage, mustard, pickled vegetables.

items.name: Currywurst
items.description: Pork bratwurst sliced and topped with house curry ketchup, curry powder.

items.name: Wild Boar Sausage
items.description: Wild boar and apple sausage, caramelized onions, grainy mustard.

items.name: Duck Sausage
items.description: Duck and fig sausage, arugula, balsamic reduction.

items.name: Vegan Sausage
items.description: Plant-based sausage, sauerkraut, vegan mustard aioli.

items.name: Lamb Merguez
items.description: North African spiced lamb sausage, harissa, tzatziki.

items.name: Venison Sausage
items.description: Ontario venison sausage, juniper berry mustard, pickled beets.

items.name: Duck Fat Fries
items.description: Hand-cut fries cooked in duck fat, garlic aioli.

items.name: Poutine
items.description: Duck fat fries, cheese curds, house gravy.

items.name: Soft Pretzel
items.description: Bavarian soft pretzel, beer cheese sauce, grainy mustard.

items.name: Fried Pickles
items.description: Beer-battered dill pickles, ranch dipping sauce.

items.name: Sausage Platter
items.description: Three sausages of your choice, sauerkraut, mustards, fresh roll.

items.name: Schnitzel
items.description: Breaded and pan-fried pork schnitzel, lemon, potato salad, lingonberry.

items.name: Beer Can Chicken
items.description: Half chicken slow-roasted with craft beer, coleslaw, fries.

items.name: Apple Strudel
items.description: Warm apple strudel, vanilla ice cream, caramel sauce.

items.name: Chocolate Pretzel Cake
items.description: Rich chocolate cake with pretzel crust, salted caramel.
